Legionnaires' Disease 
URL of this page: https://medlineplus.gov/legionnairesdisease.html 
Legionnaires' Disease
Also called: Legionellosis 
Summary 
What is Legionnaires' Disease? 
Legionnaires' disease is a serious type of pneumonia caused by Legionella bacteria . The disease got its name when a group of people at an American Legion convention became ill with this type of pneumonia.
Legionella is found naturally in freshwater, such as lakes and rivers. It can also be found in soil. But people usually only get sick from it whe
